message:
Add automatic Cloudflare deployment to CI

Deploys to Cloudflare Workers automatically after CI passes on main branch. Runs DB migrations before deployment using existing package.json scripts.

files.patch:
@@ -38,3 +38,36 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Build application
         run: bun run build
+
+  deploy:
+    name: Deploy to Cloudflare
+    runs-on: macos-14
+    needs: [build]
+    if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push' }}
+    environment:
+      name: Production
+      url: https://vibeinsights.com
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Run migrations
+        run: bun run db:migrate:remote
+        working-directory: ./packages/web
+        env:
+          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Deploy
+        run: bun run deploy
+        working-directory: ./packages/web
+        env:
+          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
